events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess fireblocking/draftstopping commercial project, observed open stud bays at floor transitions, rough-complete, reference IRC R302. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Open stud bays at floor transitions likely missing fireblocking. In commercial, IRC maybe not applicable (commercial uses IBC), but reference says apply IRC R302. R302 Fire protection: fireblocking required to cut off concealed draft openings between stories and between top story and roof/attic. Open stud bays at floor transitions are non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk high (fire spread). Work stage rough-complete. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 70? Value 0. Confidence high. Findings: open stud bays at floor transitions lack fireblocking, creating concealed vertical draft openings between floors. Actions: install approved fireblocking material at top/bottom of stud bays at floor transitions, inspect prior to concealment. Rationale: IRC R302 requires fireblocking to prevent flame/draft spread in concealed spaces; open bays violate. References: IRC R302. Need include all fields. sound_source empty? Schema string, maybe "". event_time 0, rate 0, order [], workable []. Let's produce JSON.
